works.name: example-idea-module-page
works.payload: Add a canonical module page for grouped-query-attention: kind module, slug grouped-query-attention, link to the attention concept and primary paper citations, and keep registry records, messages, and assets aligned with the documentation template.

works.name: example-idea-concept-crosslink
works.payload: Refresh the attention concept page cross-links so readers can discover grouped-query-attention, multi-head attention, and related attention variants from one isolation-first explainer without adding benchmark tables.
